name: investing-toolkit
description: Investing research toolkit — macro regime diagnosis (US/JP/TW/KR/CN), DCF and screening workflows, equity snapshots via yfinance, FRED, BOJ, FinMind, FinanceDataReader, and akshare adapters. 投資調査・美股・台股・日股・韓股・中國股。投資研究工具組。 ⚠️ Claude Code CLI only — Cowork sandbox blocks external data fetches.
